summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AS Intel e-commerce intelligence platform with real Olist Brazilian dataset. All backend APIs working (100% success rate) and frontend features fully functional including real data display, export functionality, and assistant chat integration.

minor_issues.issue: CSV export endpoints return 200 status but test framework tries to parse CSV as JSON
minor_issues.impact: Test framework issue only - actual CSV export functionality works correctly

passed_tests: App successfully renamed to 'AS Intel' throughout the application
Dashboard displays real Olist data: R$13.59M revenue, 99,441 orders, 96,096 customers
All 5 KPI cards showing correct values: Total Revenue, Orders, Customers, Avg Review (4.09), Sellers (3,095)
Revenue chart displays 2017-2018 monthly data with working year filter
Top Product Categories shows real Olist categories: bed_bath_table, health_beauty, sports_leisure, etc.
Sales by State chart shows Brazilian states (SP, RJ, MG, RS, PR, etc.)
Customer Segmentation (RFM) shows proper distribution by customer value tier
Payment Methods section displays correct percentages: credit_card 73.9%, boleto 19.1%
Export CSV button functional on Dashboard page
Insights page displays 6 real Olist-based business insights
Export dropdown (PDF/CSV) working on Insights page
CSV export APIs (/api/export/insights/csv and /api/export/dashboard/csv) returning 200 status
Floating chat widget accessible from all pages with AS Intel Assistant branding
Chat responds with Olist-specific data (bed_bath_table, health_beauty categories)
Architecture page shows comprehensive Olist dataset structure with file details
All backend API endpoints (root, KPIs, revenue, products, states, segments, payments, insights, chat, status, exports)
Assistant chat functionality with proper Olist-specific responses
Navigation between all pages working correctly
